command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user c2qSkVB4gKtEmor.bc3c8c9ce52a --database VzNbWtRJAsr2zJAegEjRtX --execute SHOW CREATE TABLE otelmsDailyReports;

stdout:
Table	Create Table
otelmsDailyReports	CREATE TABLE `otelmsDailyReports` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `reportDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `checkIns` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `checkOuts` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `cancellations` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `totalRevenue` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `adr` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `occupancyRate` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `revPAR` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `totalGuests` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `totalChildren` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `roomsOccupied` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `carsParked` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `channelData` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `emailId` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `rawContent` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `idx_reportDate` (`reportDate`),
  UNIQUE KEY `reportDate` (`reportDate`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
